name: Chunk Data
desc: Sends a chunk section to the client (16x16x16 block data).

fields.name: groundUpContinuous
fields.desc: Whether this is a fresh chunk

fields.name: bitmask
fields.desc: Which sections are present (bit 0 = section 0, etc.)

fields.name: data
fields.desc: Compressed chunk data (block IDs, block light, sky light, biome)

notes: The data contains: 4096 block IDs per section (2 bytes each = block palette), 2048 bytes block light (4 bits per block), 2048 bytes sky light, optional biome info. All compressed together with zlib.

implementation.overview: Sends chunk data (compressed). Modules: XRay (reveal ores), Search (find blocks), ChestESP, AntiChunkBan.

modules.name: XRay
modules.purpose: Modify chunk data to reveal specific blocks.
